## Description

A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

```ts
import { Terlik } from "terlik.js";
const t = new Terlik({ language: "tr" });

// What you did:
t.containsProfanity("...");  // Expected: true/false, Got: ...
```

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened.
